title: Zeebe Job
description: A job activated from a service task in a Zeebe process instance, to be processed by a worker.

type.description: Job type matching the worker subscription

processInstanceKey.description: Key of the process instance this job belongs to

elementId.description: ID of the BPMN element that created this job

elementInstanceKey.description: Key of the element instance that created this job

customHeaders.description: Custom headers defined in the BPMN element

worker.description: Name of the worker that activated this job

deadline.description: Unix timestamp in milliseconds when the job lock expires

variables.description: Process variables fetched for this job
